title: Regeneron 2025 Annual Report

note: Primary investor release for 2025 product sales, Dupixent global sales, EYLEA/EYLEA HD sales, and profitability context.

title: Regeneron U.S. FDA-Approved Medicines
note: Official product listing used to confirm Regeneron's approved medicine portfolio and product names.

title: DUPIXENT Official Patient Site
note: Official product site for Dupixent patient-facing context and partnership attribution.

note: Official professional source confirming Dupixent indications across type 2 inflammatory diseases.

title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Market Capitalization
note: Market-cap source specified in the intake manifest and used for ranking context.

title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Stock Price and Overview
note: Supplemental public market-data source for current market capitalization and valuation context.

title: Open Targets Platform
note: Open-source therapeutic target-discovery platform used as an upstream alternative and decentralization enabler.

title: OpenFold Consortium
note: Open-source protein-modeling project used as an enabling primitive for decentralized biomedical discovery.

title: Arvados Open Source Biomedical Data Platform
note: Open-source biomedical data management and processing platform used to support federated evidence and research-data concepts.
